expectations.text: Output contains a HYGIENE REPORT section with a structured table-like format listing all checks
expectations.evidence: Output uses '## End-of-Session Hygiene Report' prose heading with numbered sections, no ══ border table format

expectations.text: Output reports the test suite result including a passed count (expect ~271 passed)
expectations.evidence: Section 6 reports '271 passed, 5 skipped (MIMIC data not downloaded — correct and expected)'

expectations.text: Output explicitly checks and reports the CLAUDE.md line count
expectations.evidence: No CLAUDE.md line count check present anywhere in output; skill-specific check absent

expectations.text: Output runs a secret scan (grepping for api_key, sk-ant-, etc.) and reports CLEAN or issues
expectations.evidence: Section 2 reports CRITICAL: real Groq key in .env; also confirms src/ is CLEAN

expectations.text: Output runs a PHI leak scan and reports a result
expectations.evidence: Section 3 reports HIPAA logging compliance CLEAN

expectations.text: Output includes a final 'Session closed:' status line
expectations.evidence: Output ends with an 'Action Items Before Next Session' table; no 'Session closed:' line
